terms.name: AMOS-SYSTEM
terms.definition: Complete system including repository, runtime, organism OS, workers and godmode supervisor.

terms.name: engine
terms.definition: Structured logic module that behaves like an organ; stable and reusable.

terms.name: agent
terms.definition: Active worker that uses engines to carry out tasks; analogous to a cell.

terms.name: kernel
terms.definition: Low level processor that routes signals between engines, agents and brainstack; analogous to a nerve cluster.

terms.name: worker
terms.definition: Specialised execution unit responsible for a category of tasks; analogous to specialised cells or subsystems.

terms.name: organism_os
terms.definition: Life support orchestration for the AMOS organism; includes godmode supervisor and core loops.

terms.name: memory_core
terms.definition: Event and experience index; appends and indexes execution events and state transitions.

terms.name: dashboard
terms.definition: Human facing telemetry interface that shows internal state, tasks and predictions.

terms.name: godmode
terms.definition: Top level executive controller that coordinates brainstack, sensors, executor and dashboards.

terms.name: executor_loop
terms.definition: Continuous loop that pulls tasks and executes them using engines, agents and workers.

terms.name: nervous_system
terms.definition: Mapping onto kernels, executors, routing and message passing between components.

terms.name: organs
terms.definition: Mapping onto engines and complex subsystems that keep the system alive.

terms.name: cells
terms.definition: Mapping onto agents and workers that act locally based on shared logic.

terms.name: blood
terms.definition: Mapping onto task queue messages, memory events and data flowing between components.

terms.name: fascia
terms.definition: Mapping onto directory structure and naming conventions that glue all modules together.

terms.name: electromagnetic_body
terms.definition: Mapping onto message passing, kernel signals and cross component communication.

terms.name: Directed Intelligence
terms.definition: Top down logical control that enforces alignment across all components.

terms.name: Systemic Intelligence
terms.definition: Full system integration where every organ and worker participates in a single architecture.

terms.name: Absolute Biological Integrity
terms.definition: End state where internal and external structures are fully aligned with zero structural gaps.

terms.name: Inner Alignment
terms.definition: Internal consistency of logic, naming and behaviour inside the system.

terms.name: Systemic Precision
terms.definition: Cross domain consistency between engines, agents, workers and external interfaces.

terms.name: First Principles Articulation
terms.definition: Reduction of concepts into functional primitives and reconstruction using exact language.

terms.name: Law of Law
terms.definition: Meta rule that all subsystems must obey the highest structural rules defined for the organism.

terms.name: Rule of 2
terms.definition: Duality check between inputs and outputs; every move has a paired counter check.

terms.name: Rule of 4
terms.definition: Quadrant mapping of structure, function, dynamics and integration for each subsystem.

terms.name: Signal Fidelity Preservation
terms.definition: Refusal to emit false emotional or ethical signals; outputs must reflect actual internal state.

terms.name: OMEGA
terms.definition: Full organism mode where all core subsystems are online and connected.

terms.name: GAMMA
terms.definition: Deep scan and repair mode for discovering gaps, regenerating missing pieces and resetting state.

terms.name: SIGMA
terms.definition: Stable synchronised state after OMEGA boot; sensors, memory, executor and dashboard agree.

terms.name: ALPHA
terms.definition: Basic or sandbox mode with partial activation.

terms.name: BETA
terms.definition: Development or incomplete integration state; not yet fully aligned.

terms.name: Omega Gamma Sweep
terms.definition: Full stack audit and rebuild that runs deep scan, repair and then complete activation.

terms.name: GODMODE_FULL_SYSTEM_ONLINE
terms.definition: Brainstack, sensors, executor and dashboard bridge are all running under godmode supervisor.

terms.name: executor_loop
terms.definition: Continuous processing of tasks, including memory append and result logging.

terms.name: sensor_loop
terms.definition: Continuous monitoring of environment or internal metrics.
